items.a: Yes, the initial consultation is free of charge.
Yes, our clinic operates by appointment only. Please book online, by phone, or by email.

items.q: Can I receive treatment on the same day?
items.a: Same-day treatment may be possible depending on schedule and availability.
A doctor or nurse will explain the treatment details and precautions.
Yes, we can assist you in Chinese.

items.q: How long does the first visit take?
items.a: The first visit usually takes within 60 minutes. Subsequent visits may be shorter.
We are located at Ginza Seigetsudo Bldg. 5F, 5-9-15 Ginza, Chuo-ku, Tokyo, near Ginza Station on the Tokyo Metro.
Costs vary depending on the treatment. Details will be provided during your consultation.

items.q: What happens if I cancel without notice?
items.a: A cancellation fee of 3,000 yen may apply. Please contact us in advance if you need to cancel or reschedule.

items.q: Can I book my next appointment at the clinic?
items.a: Yes, you can schedule your next visit at the clinic after your treatment.
